examples: One boy did an imitation of a soldier with a loudspeaker.
I distinctly heard the loudspeaker calling passengers for the Washington-Miami flight.
It makes one think of the story about the airline pilot who told his passengers over the loudspeaker.
"Darling, I can hear Bing (Crosby) singing over the loudspeaker, " wrote Lloyd on July 6, 1944.
Like its larger sibling, the SS-AR2 loudspeaker is a 4-unit, 3-way floor-standing vented box speaker system.
